body.docName: 新建用车申请单（草稿、审批通过、审批中）
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/apply/use-car/create 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/apply/use-car/create 
 ## 接口描述 
支持系统调用接口新增草稿、审批通过的用车申请单

### 自定义字段传值格式和说明如下：

| 字段类型 | 说明                                                         | fieldValue示例                                               |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 单行文本 | 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入          | 单行文本11                                                   |
| 多行文本 | 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入          | 多行文本11                                                   |
| 数字     | 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入    | 8.6                                                          |
| 金额     | 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入    | 9.6                                                          |
| 单选     | 选项值，value以字符串格式传入                                | 选项1                                                        |
| 多选     | 选项值，value以Json格式字符串传入                            | [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]                                       |
| 下拉选择 | 支持单/多选，以自定义字段配置为准, value 以选项值传入 Json格式字符串 | [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]                                       |
| 手机号码 | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 18858885666                                                  |
| 日期选择 | 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式传入        | 2023-08-01 12:30                                             |
| 日期区间 | 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式，用","拼接传入 | 2023-08-01 12:30,2023-08-02 12:30                            |
| 银行卡号 | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 6222252225436456                                             |
| 邮箱     | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 123456@163.com                                               |
| 附件     | 附件编号，value以字符串格式传入                              | 4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96                         |
| 层级选择 | 选项层级、选项值，以及和选项路径所有节点的选项层级、选项值。选项层级以数字传入，选项值为字符串 | [{\"level\": \"1\", \"value\": \"选项1\"}, {\"level\": \"2\", \"value:\": \"选项1-1\"}] |
| 关联字段 | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 关联字段值                                                   |
| 表格     | 每一行根据序号值区分，每一行中，每个表格值将titleCode和value 传入 Json格式字符串 | [{\"sequence\": 1, \"columnValues\": [{\"titleCode\": \"NAME\", \"value\": \"张三\"}, {\"titleCode\": \"AGE\", \"value\": \"26\"}]},{\"sequence\": 2, \"columnValues\": [{\"titleCode\": \"NAME\", \"value\": \"李四\"}, {\"titleCode\": \"AGE\", \"value\": \"28\"}]}] |
| 人员     | value 以花名册编号传入 Json格式字符串                        | [\"EMP_NUMBER_01\", \"EMP_NUMBER_02\"]                       |
| 单据部门 | 组织编码以字符串形式传入                                     | 00000001                                                     |
| 单据项目 | value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串                           | [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]                               |
| 关联单据 | 费控系统单据编号，以字符串形式传入                           | 2023080202288221                                             |
| 申请金额 | 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入    | 66\.6                                                        |
| 城市     | 城市编码，以字符串形式传入                                   | 20                                                           |
| 供应商   | value以供应商编号传入                                        | SUP20211109091900                                            |
| 客户     | value以客户编号传入 Json格式字符串                           | [\"CUSTOMER_01\", \"CUSTOMER_02\"]                           |
| 合同     | value以合同编号传入                                          | 8768768768768                                                |
| 成本中心 | value以成本中心编号传入                                      | center001                                                    |
| 档案选择 | value以自定义档案选项编码传入                                | option01                                                     |
| 部门     | value以薪福通组织编码传入 Json格式字符串                     | [\"ORG_01\", \"ORG_02\"]                                     |
| 项目     | value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串                           | [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]                               |
| 事业部   | value以薪福通组织编码传入                                    | 00000211                                                     |
| 事项     | 配置为必填时，业务类型编码必传，且下级存在事项和事由时，事项编码和事由编码必传。value以“业务类型编码,事项编码,事由编码”传入 Json格式字符串 | [\"MATTER_TYPE_1\", \"MATTER_MISSION_1\", \"MATTER_DETAIL_1\"] |
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"eventNumber","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"01230908150304000001","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"outRelId","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%96%E9%83%A8%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"00751658","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billDepartmentCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%9B%0D%0A%0D%0A%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E4%B8%8E%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billCompanyCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%EF%BC%9B%0D%0A%0D%0A%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%B8%8E%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billStatus","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"DRAFT","desc":"%20DRAFT%EF%BC%9A%E8%8D%89%E7%A8%BF%EF%BC%9BAPPRV%EF%BC%9A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%EF%BC%9BAPPRV_PEND%EF%BC%9A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E4%B8%AD"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldNumber","required":true,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"MULTI_INPUT_100633690","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldValue","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%9A%E8%A1%8C%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%E4%B8%AD%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E5%92%8C%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"useCarInfo","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%A8%E8%BD%A6%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"useCarPersonNumber","required":true,"label":"%E4%B9%98%E8%BD%A6%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"111","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"applyType","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%88%AB","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200%EF%BC%9A%E6%9C%AC%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%A8%E8%BD%A6%EF%BC%8C1%EF%BC%9A%E4%BB%96%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%A8%E8%BD%A6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableCarTypeNumbers","required":true,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E8%BD%A6%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22car111%22%2C%22car222%22%5D","desc":""},"children":[],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"useCarPersonCount","required":true,"label":"%E4%B9%98%E8%BD%A6%E4%BA%BA%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"7","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"startDate","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2023-09-11%2015%3A24%3A00","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"endDate","required":true,"label":"%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2023-09-11%2016%3A24%3A00","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"departCityCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%91%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"departAddressDetail","required":true,"label":"%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%91%E5%9C%B0%E8%AF%A6%E7%BB%86%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"%E5%8C%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%B8%82%E7%9A%84%E8%AF%A6%E7%BB%86%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"arriveCityCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%B0%E8%BE%BE%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"105","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"arriveAddressDetail","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%B0%E8%BE%BE%E5%9C%B0%E8%AF%A6%E7%BB%86%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"%E5%AE%89%E5%BA%86%E5%B8%82%E7%9A%84%E8%AF%A6%E7%BB%86%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}],"open":false}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2023100901857208","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":"%20SUC0000-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8CE0001-%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "eventId": "01230908150304000001",
    "outRelId": "",
    "empNumber": "111",
    "billDepartmentCode": "",
    "billCompanyCode": "",
    "billStatus": "DRAFT",
    "customFieldValues": [
        {
            "fieldNumber": "MULTI_INPUT_100633690",
            "fieldValue": "这是一个事由"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ADV_CITY_095934336",
            "fieldValue": "1,2"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ADV_CITY_095936507",
            "fieldValue": "105"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ADV_SUPPLIER_095940384",
            "fieldValue": "SUP20230525222006"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ADV_CUSTOMER_095944000",
            "fieldValue": "111111,"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ADV_CUSTOMER_100629729",
            "fieldValue": "CUS20230830113756"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ADV_CONTRACT_095948318",
            "fieldValue": "8792363"
        }
    ],
    "useCarInfo": {
        "useCarPersonNumber": "111",
        "applyType": "0",
        "availableCarTypeNumbers": [
            "car111",
            "car112"
        ],
        "useCarPersonCount": 7,
        "startDate": "2023-09-11 15:24:00",
        "endDate": "2023-09-11 16:24:00",
        "departCityCode": "1",
        "departAddressDetail": "北京市的详细地址",
        "arriveCityCode": "105",
        "arriveAddressDetail": "安庆市的详细地址"
    }
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": 2023100901857208,
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}  
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | E0001 | 具体业务异常提示 |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/apply/use-car/create

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/apply/use-car/create

接口描述

支持系统调用接口新增草稿、审批通过的用车申请单

自定义字段传值格式和说明如下：

字段类型 说明 fieldValue示例
单行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 单行文本11
多行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 多行文本11
数字 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 8.6
金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 9.6
单选 选项值，value以字符串格式传入 选项1
多选 选项值，value以Json格式字符串传入 ["选项1", "选项2"]
下拉选择 支持单/多选，以自定义字段配置为准, value 以选项值传入 Json格式字符串 ["选项1", "选项2"]
手机号码 value以字符串格式传入 18858885666
日期选择 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式传入 2023-08-01 12:30
日期区间 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式，用","拼接传入 2023-08-01 12:30,2023-08-02 12:30
银行卡号 value以字符串格式传入 6222252225436456
邮箱 value以字符串格式传入 123456@163.com
附件 附件编号，value以字符串格式传入 4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96
层级选择 选项层级、选项值，以及和选项路径所有节点的选项层级、选项值。选项层级以数字传入，选项值为字符串 [{"level": "1", "value": "选项1"}, {"level": "2", "value:": "选项1-1"}]
关联字段 value以字符串格式传入 关联字段值
表格 每一行根据序号值区分，每一行中，每个表格值将titleCode和value 传入 Json格式字符串 [{"sequence": 1, "columnValues": [{"titleCode": "NAME", "value": "张三"}, {"titleCode": "AGE", "value": "26"}]},{"sequence": 2, "columnValues": [{"titleCode": "NAME", "value": "李四"}, {"titleCode": "AGE", "value": "28"}]}]
人员 value 以花名册编号传入 Json格式字符串 ["EMP_NUMBER_01", "EMP_NUMBER_02"]
单据部门 组织编码以字符串形式传入 00000001
单据项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 ["PROJECT_1", "PROJECT_2"]
关联单据 费控系统单据编号，以字符串形式传入 2023080202288221
申请金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 66.6
城市 城市编码，以字符串形式传入 20
供应商 value以供应商编号传入 SUP20211109091900
客户 value以客户编号传入 Json格式字符串 ["CUSTOMER_01", "CUSTOMER_02"]
合同 value以合同编号传入 8768768768768
成本中心 value以成本中心编号传入 center001
档案选择 value以自定义档案选项编码传入 option01
部门 value以薪福通组织编码传入 Json格式字符串 ["ORG_01", "ORG_02"]
项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 ["PROJECT_1", "PROJECT_2"]
事业部 value以薪福通组织编码传入 00000211
事项 配置为必填时，业务类型编码必传，且下级存在事项和事由时，事项编码和事由编码必传。value以“业务类型编码,事项编码,事由编码”传入 Json格式字符串 ["MATTER_TYPE_1", "MATTER_MISSION_1", "MATTER_DETAIL_1"]

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON
